pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the sports consultancy and wellbeing services with quick access to all key tasks.
primary_functions: Introduce main service areas: consultations, programs, classes, coaching, challenges, memberships, and resources
Provide prominent shortcuts to book a consultation, browse programs, view the class schedule, open the training planner, and explore memberships
Highlight featured offers such as stress management programs, nutrition bundles, and free challenges
Offer a simple 'Get Started' helper to route users by goal (e.g., improve running, manage stress, build strength)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Use 'Get Started' helper with a goal that maps to 1:1 coaching (e.g., improve running technique)
Click 'Browse Programs' quick action or a featured program card
Click 'View Class Schedule' quick action
Click 'Open Training Planner' quick action
Click 'View Memberships' quick action
Click a featured free challenge such as the 7-Day Wellbeing Challenge
Click a featured nutrition coaching bundle teaser
Click cart icon in header or 'View Cart' link from any home section

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Home'
Accessed directly via the root URL or index.html

pages.name: Consultations Listing
pages.description: Browse and filter all 1:1 consultations such as running technique, strength coaching, and wellbeing sessions.
primary_functions: Filter consultations by service type (e.g., running_technique, strength_coaching, wellbeing_coaching)
Filter by duration (e.g., 30, 45, 60 minutes) and show only sessions matching the chosen length
Filter by date via a date picker and apply a time-of-day filter (e.g., sessions starting at or after 5:00 pm)
Sort consultation results by price (low_to_high, high_to_low), rating, or earliest availability
Display key summary info (title, coach, duration, price, next available time) and open the consultation detail page

incoming_params.description: Preselected consultation service type (e.g., 'running_technique') used to initialize filters.
Optional preselected duration in minutes (e.g., 60) used to initialize the duration filter.
ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) used to prefill the date picker when landing on the listing.
Key of the time-of-day range (e.g., 'evening') used to preselect the time-of-day filter.
Sort option key (e.g., 'price_low_to_high') used to preselect the sort dropdown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a consultation card in the search results
Click cart icon or 'View Cart' from the consultations listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Consultations' header navigation link
Accessed with optional pre-filter query parameters for type, duration, date, and sort

pages.name: Consultation Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single 1:1 consultation including schedule, pricing, and booking form.
primary_functions: Show full consultation information including description, coach bio, inclusions, duration, and price
Display available time slots for the selected date, allowing users to choose a specific start time (e.g., after 5:00 pm next Tuesday)
Allow selection of date (if not carried over from listing) and number of participants for the consultation
Provide a booking form to enter required details such as name, phone number, and email
Add the selected consultation slot to the cart/booking summary when the user clicks 'Book Now' or 'Continue'

incoming_params.description: ConsultationService ID whose details should be displayed.
Preselected date (YYYY-MM-DD) used to load that day's available time slots.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book Now', 'Continue', or 'View Cart' after successfully adding a consultation to the cart
Click 'Back to all consultations' link or breadcrumb

access_methods.description: Accessed when a consultation card is clicked, passing service_id (and optionally date) in the query string
Can be deep-linked directly with a known service_id

pages.name: Programs Listing
pages.description: Browse online programs such as stress management, performance plans, and multi-week courses.
primary_functions: Filter programs by category or topic (e.g., stress_management, resilience, nutrition)
Filter by program duration (e.g., 2_weeks, 4_weeks, 8_weeks) to show only 4-week options when required
Filter by price using a maximum price slider or input (e.g., max $120)
Filter by minimum rating (e.g., 4.0, 4.5 stars and above)
Sort programs by rating (high_to_low), price, or popularity so highest-rated options appear first
Open a specific program detail page to review contents and enroll

incoming_params.description: Preselected program category (e.g., 'stress_management') used to initialize filters.
Optional duration in weeks (e.g., 4) used to filter program results.
Optional maximum price used to initialize the price filter.
Optional minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4.5) used to filter results.
Sort option key (e.g., 'rating_high_to_low') used to preselect the sort dropdown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a program card in the listing
Click cart icon or 'View Cart' from the programs page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Programs' header navigation link
Accessible with optional pre-filter query parameters for category, duration, price, and rating

pages.name: Program Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single online program with syllabus, schedule, and enrollment options.
primary_functions: Present detailed program information, including weekly breakdown, outcomes, delivery format, and total duration (e.g., 4 weeks)
Show pricing and available tiers or access levels (e.g., standard, premium), with a default selection such as Standard
Allow the user to choose a start date within a selectable range (e.g., within the next 30 days)
Optionally select access level tier from a dropdown if multiple tiers exist
Add the program to the cart via an 'Add to Cart' or 'Enroll' button while retaining chosen start date and tier

incoming_params.description: Program ID whose details and tiers should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to Cart', 'Enroll', or 'View Cart' after adding the program to the cart
Click 'Back to all programs' or breadcrumb navigation

access_methods.description: Accessed when a program card is clicked, passing program_id in the query string
Can be deep-linked directly with a known program_id

pages.name: Classes Schedule
pages.description: Schedule view of group classes and sessions, enabling filtered browsing and booking.
primary_functions: Display an interactive schedule of group classes for selected dates
Provide a date picker to choose a specific day (e.g., next upcoming Saturday)
Filter classes by time-of-day (e.g., morning 8:00 am to 12:00 pm), intensity (e.g., moderate), and duration (e.g., 45 minutes or less)
Show each class with start time, end time, intensity, duration, and remaining spots
Allow users to open a class detail page to confirm information and book
Support users in identifying non-overlapping classes by clearly showing times and durations

incoming_params.description: Selected schedule date (YYYY-MM-DD) to display when the page loads.
Preselected time-of-day range key (e.g., 'morning') used to filter sessions.
Optional preselected intensity filter (e.g., 'moderate').
Optional maximum duration in minutes (e.g., 45) for pre-filtering class results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific class session in the schedule
Click cart icon or 'View Cart' from the classes page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Classes' header navigation link
Can be loaded with a specific date and optional filters via query parameters

pages.name: Class Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single group class, with booking controls for a specific date and attendee count.
primary_functions: Display class description, focus (e.g., strength, yoga, conditioning), intensity, and trainer information
Confirm or allow selection of the class date (e.g., the chosen Saturday) and show all available start times that day if applicable
Allow users to choose the number of attendees (e.g., 1) for the booking
Show class duration and end time so users can ensure non-overlapping scheduling with other classes
Add the selected class occurrence to the cart or 'My Bookings' when the user clicks 'Book' or 'Add to Schedule'

incoming_params.description: GroupClassSession ID representing the specific class occurrence.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to schedule' after viewing or booking a class
Click 'Book', 'Add to Schedule', or 'View Cart' after a successful booking

access_methods.description: Accessed when a class session is clicked in the schedule, passing session_id in the query string
Can be deep-linked directly with a known session_id

pages.name: Training Planner
pages.description: Interactive weekly training planner for building workout schedules from templates.
primary_functions: Start a new weekly training plan via a 'Create New Plan' or 'Start New Week' action
Open a workout template library panel listing templates by type and duration
Filter cardio templates with duration under 30 minutes and assign one to a chosen day/time (e.g., Monday 7:00 am)
Filter strength templates with duration between 30 and 45 minutes and assign one to a chosen day/time (e.g., Wednesday 6:00 pm)
Filter mobility or stretching templates with duration at least 20 minutes and assign one to a chosen day/time (e.g., Friday)
Allow naming the plan (e.g., 'Balanced Week Plan') and saving it via a 'Save Plan' or 'Save Schedule' button

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' or logo after saving a plan

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Tools' header navigation link
Can be opened directly from home quick actions or bookmarks

pages.name: Coaching & Services
pages.description: Overview of coaching services including nutrition coaching and other 1:1 support, with filters for bundles.
primary_functions: Present coaching categories such as nutrition_coaching, performance_coaching, and wellbeing_coaching
Within nutrition_coaching, filter offerings by product type (e.g., single_sessions, bundles) to show only bundles
Filter nutrition bundles by maximum price (e.g., $250) so only qualifying bundles appear
Sort bundles by price (low_to_high) to identify the cheapest and second-cheapest bundles easily
Open individual bundle detail pages to review total coaching time and inclusions

incoming_params.description: Preselected coaching category (e.g., 'nutrition_coaching') used to focus the page.
Optional preselected product type filter (e.g., 'bundle').
Optional maximum price used to filter nutrition bundles.
Sort option key (e.g., 'price_low_to_high') for nutrition bundle listings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a nutrition bundle card
Click into 1:1 coaching consultations from the services overview
Click cart icon or 'View Cart' from the services page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Coaching' header navigation link
Supports optional query parameters for category and nutrition bundle filters

pages.name: Nutrition Bundle Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific nutrition coaching bundle, emphasizing total coaching minutes and options.
primary_functions: Show full bundle description, including number of sessions, minutes per session, and total coaching minutes
Display bundle price and any limits such as 'Start within 30 days'
Allow selection of optional settings such as preferred coach or start window from dropdowns
Help users compare perceived value by clearly presenting total minutes and cost per minute (textual, not calculation tools)
Add the chosen bundle to the cart via an 'Add to Cart' or 'Enroll' button

incoming_params.description: NutritionBundle ID whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to Cart', 'Enroll', or 'View Cart' after selecting bundle options
Click 'Back to nutrition bundles' link or breadcrumb

access_methods.description: Accessed when a nutrition bundle item is clicked, passing bundle_id in the query string
Can be deep-linked directly with a known bundle_id

pages.name: Challenges Listing
pages.description: List of free and paid short-term challenges like 7-day wellbeing or movement streaks.
primary_functions: Display a grid or list of challenges with key info such as duration (e.g., 7 days), focus, and price (including 'Free')
Filter challenges by price type to show only free_challenges when needed
Surface a '7-Day Wellbeing Challenge' card or similar option clearly for quick selection
Allow users to open a challenge detail page to see requirements and sign up

incoming_params.description: Preselected price type filter (e.g., 'free') used to show only free challenges.
Optional duration in days (e.g., 7) used to focus on specific-length challenges.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a challenge card
Click cart icon from the challenges listing (for any paid challenges added)

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Challenges' header navigation link
Supports optional query parameters for pre-filtering by price type and duration

pages.name: Challenge Detail
pages.description: Detail and signup page for a specific challenge, such as a free 7-day wellbeing email challenge.
primary_functions: Describe the challenge goals, daily structure, topics covered, and who it is for
Provide a clear 'Join Now' or 'Sign Up' button to open or focus the registration form
Collect basic participant details such as first name and email address
Provide a start date selector to choose a date (e.g., next Monday) for the challenge to begin
Offer a time-of-day selector (e.g., 8:00 am) for email or reminder delivery
List optional themes or topics (e.g., sleep, mindfulness, nutrition) with checkboxes to select only desired themes
Submit the registration via a 'Join Challenge' or 'Start Challenge' button and display a confirmation state

incoming_params.description: Challenge ID whose details and registration form should be shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all challenges' after viewing or registering
Click 'Return to Home' from a registration confirmation message

access_methods.description: Accessed when a challenge card is clicked, passing challenge_id in the query string
Can be deep-linked directly with a known challenge_id

pages.name: Articles Listing
pages.description: Resources and blog index for wellbeing, performance, nutrition, and mindset articles.
primary_functions: Provide a search bar for keyword queries (e.g., 'injury prevention for runners')
Display search results with titles, short summaries, tags, and estimated read time indicators
Allow filtering by topic categories (e.g., mental_resilience, mindset, nutrition, fueling, running)
Highlight articles with read times under a threshold (e.g., under 10 minutes) where relevant
Open article detail pages for full reading and saving to a reading list

incoming_params.description: Search query string entered by the user (e.g., 'injury prevention for runners').
Preselected article category (e.g., 'nutrition', 'mental_resilience') used to filter results.
Optional maximum estimated reading time in minutes (e.g., 10) used to highlight or filter short articles.
Optional view mode (e.g., 'reading_list') to display saved articles instead of general search.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title or card in the listing
Click 'My Reading List' tab or button
Click cart icon from the resources section

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Resources' header navigation link
Supports query parameters for search queries, categories, and viewing the reading list

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for a single article with reading-time info and save/bookmark controls.
primary_functions: Display the article title, publication date, author, tags, and estimated reading time
Present the complete article content in a readable format
Allow the user to save, bookmark, or 'Add to Reading List' this article with a single click
Provide navigation back to the articles listing or to related articles in similar topics
Indicate saved state (e.g., bookmarked) so the user knows it is in their reading list

incoming_params.description: Article ID whose full content should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to articles' or on a category tag
Click 'View Reading List' after saving the article

access_methods.description: Accessed when an article is selected from the listing, passing article_id in the query string
Can be deep-linked directly with a known article_id

pages.name: Memberships & Add-ons
pages.description: Page for selecting gym memberships and yoga add-ons or class passes, especially for monthly plans.
primary_functions: List available memberships with key details such as gym access, included classes, and billing frequency
Filter memberships by billing period (e.g., monthly) and benefits (e.g., gym_access) to show only relevant options
Allow selection of a monthly gym access plan at or below a chosen price threshold (e.g., $150) and add it to the cart
Present a dedicated 'Add-ons' or 'Class Passes' section featuring yoga options (e.g., at least 1 class per week)
Allow users to select and add yoga add-ons to the cart from this page
Display indicative combined monthly costs for gym membership plus selected yoga add-ons to help stay under $180

incoming_params.description: Preselected billing period (e.g., 'monthly') for membership search.
Preselected benefit filter code (e.g., 'gym_access') to highlight relevant plans.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' or 'Review Subscription' after adding a membership and/or yoga add-on
Click 'Back to Home' or logo from the memberships page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Memberships' header navigation link
Supports optional query parameters to pre-filter by billing period and benefits

pages.name: Cart & Bookings Summary
pages.description: Unified cart and booking summary for sessions, programs, bundles, memberships, and add-ons.
primary_functions: Show a consolidated list of all items added: consultations, classes, online programs, coaching bundles, memberships, and yoga add-ons
Display key details for each item such as date, time, duration, quantity/attendees, start dates, tiers, and price
Allow editing of certain options (e.g., change date/time where appropriate) or removal of items via a delete or remove action
Show subtotals for one-off purchases and a separate summary for recurring monthly charges to support budget checks (e.g., under $180 total)
Allow users to remove and reselect yoga add-ons if the combined membership total exceeds budget
Provide a clear 'Proceed to Checkout' or 'Continue' button to move to the checkout details page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Proceed to Checkout' or 'Continue' on the cart page
Click 'Adjust Membership/Add-ons' if recurring monthly total exceeds budget
Click 'Continue Browsing' or logo from the cart page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Cart' header navigation link and cart icon
Reached after adding items from any detail page

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Final step where the user enters purchaser information and confirms all bookings and purchases.
primary_functions: Display a final order summary including all sessions, programs, bundles, memberships, and challenges selected
Collect purchaser details such as full name, contact email, phone number, and billing address if required
Collect payment details or payment confirmation (implementation-agnostic) to complete the transaction
Allow the user to review and confirm terms and policies before placing the order
Provide a 'Place Order' or 'Confirm Booking' button and show a confirmation message or summary once complete

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' or logo after completing checkout or viewing confirmation
Click 'Back to Cart' to adjust items before confirming payment

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking 'Proceed to Checkout' from the cart
Can be accessed directly, but will display current cart summary via interface

pages.name: About & Info
pages.description: Background on the consultancy, approach, team, and key legal and contact information.
primary_functions: Explain the mission, philosophy, and scope of the sports consultancy and wellbeing services
Introduce key coaches or practitioners and their qualifications in brief
Provide contact information and a simple contact form or instructions for getting in touch
Include sections or links summarizing FAQs, terms of service, and privacy information for transparency
Offer reassurance about how bookings, cancellations, and programs are handled

incoming_params.description: Optional section key (e.g., 'contact', 'faqs', 'terms', 'privacy') to scroll to a specific section of the page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click logo or 'Back to Home' from the About & Info page

access_methods.description: Accessed via footer links to About, Contact, FAQs, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy (using hash anchors)
Can be opened directly via about.html, optionally with a section anchor

header_links.description: Homepage with highlights and quick access to all services
Online programs including stress management courses
Group class schedule and booking page
Coaching services overview including nutrition coaching bundles
Free and paid wellbeing challenges listing
Training planner and self-service planning tools
Articles, blog posts, and educational resources
Gym memberships and yoga add-ons and passes

footer_links.description: About the consultancy, team, and approach
Frequently asked questions about services and bookings
How personal data and privacy are handled
